cli_command.family_disambiguator: gemini -p (stdin lower attention weight; orchestrator-prompt delivered via GEMINI.md workspace file)

system_prompt_delivery_mode.notes: DEGRADED PATH. Gemini has no system-prompt-flag equivalent (per constraints/gemini-cli-no-system-prompt-flag.md). GEMINI.md in CWD is workspace-discovered and the closest available system-priority surface. Family arm copies the rendered orchestrator-prompt to ${WORKTREE}/GEMINI.md before spawn. Attention-weight risk documented; cycling at 190K (per constraints/gemini-orchestrator-host-tpm-exhaustion.md) mitigates the TPM-exhaustion clock.

mcp_registration_file_path.notes: Nested 'mcpServers' object inside settings.json, bracketed by _caa_gemini_mcp_begin / _caa_gemini_mcp_end marker keys per the install-gemini-hooks.sh idempotence model. Launcher invokes install script at pre_spawn_hook time. install-gemini-hooks.sh also installs the gemini hook shims (S13).

agent_registry_mode.notes: Gemini has no in-process Agent-tool dispatch (same as codex). Dispatch via dispatch_agent MCP tool. Agent roster inlined into orchestrator-prompt at Phase 1 neutralization. Q-15 hallucination risk mitigated by JSON Schema enum on dispatch_agent.subagent_type.

token_measurement_mechanism.parse_strategy: tee gemini --output-format stream-json stdout to gemini-stream.jsonl; parse incremental token events + final stats record per gemini-self-knowledge-r2 Q-9

auth_lifecycle.notes: Gemini OAuth refresh is fragile under long-lived orchestrator sessions per dispatch-agent-gpt-route-oauth-parity-campaign-digest.md. pre_launch_check proactively refreshes OAuth tokens before worktree creation to reduce mid-session token-expiry failures. Cycling at 190K bounds session lifetime, capping the refresh-cadence problem.
